prestazioni: Supercharged 6.2L HEMI V8 (Engine Code: SRT SC265) upgraded with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (12 psi boost, 950+ HP) paired with a Kenne Bell Boost-a-Pump fuel system and ID1000X injectors for E85 compatibility

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Getrag TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch, billet flywheel, and a Driveshaft Shop carbon fiber driveshaft (rated for 1,200 lb-ft torque)

Suspension overhaul: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable) with Hotchkis Sport sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), BMR Fabrication subframe connectors, and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full kit)
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny V3 Charger kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom matte vinyl wrap (3M 1080 Gloss Black with red accents on lower panels)
Aero package: APR Performance GTC-300 adjustable carbon fiber rear wing (300mm chord) and a custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3D-printed air dams with integrated LED turn signals)

Wheel setup: Forgeline GA3R 20x11 (front) and 20x12 (rear) wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (295/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (15.7" rotors) and Motul RBF660 brake fluid
